packageRules.description: jsdom>=27 (required by isomorphic-dompurify>=3) pulls in ESM-only deps that fail with ERR_REQUIRE_ESM on Vercel Lambda (Node 20.x < 20.19). Allow patch/minor updates within v2.x. Re-evaluate once Vercel upgrades Lambda to Node >=20.19.
jsdom>=27 pulls in ESM-only deps (@exodus/bytes, @asamuzakjp/css-color) that fail on Vercel Lambda. Allow patch/minor updates within v26.x.
https-proxy-agent>=7 is ESM-only and causes ERR_REQUIRE_ESM in jsdom@26 on Vercel Lambda. Allow patch/minor updates within v5.x.
